text:
(Translated by Google) I love everything!!!

(Original)
Me encanta todo!!!

author: Ramon Manzanares
text: Their food and servicio is really good. Thank you.

author: Chad Rook
text: Called in for a barbecue chicken pizza with triple chicken. It had no barbecue sauce and maybe regular serving of chicken. The order taker was new but I confirmed my order with the manager. This is not the first time. I’m done with Vocellis.

author: anitra fennewald
text: We love Vocelli Pizza!! Pizza is always on point and everyone is so nice!!!

author: William Simms
text: Best pizza in North Stafford, for the price. Highly recommend the pizza rolls.

author: Hope Rowlett
text: My family and I really like Vocell pizza. Every time we go in there everyone is so pleasant and so helpful.

author: Amy Gabriella

author: Simon Pyryt
text: The pizza and my favorite pepperoni rolls are the best. Staff very friendly and they deliver all over.  I get it once a week.  Thank you to everyone at Vocelli’s

author: Katie Pyryt
text: Our favorite take out pizza! The staff is so friendly. The owners Aman and Naveed are so generous and give back to our community.

author: Lauren Herman
text: We love Vocelli’s in Stafford. The pizza is hot and tasty and the Vocelli rolls are the absolute best. I love having a local option aside from the big chains. As a bonus, Vocelli’s regularly gives back to the community serving and helping to raise funds at community events. They are an asset to Stafford.

author: Diego Cornejo
text: Good pizza, good service.

author: Kayla Reeder
text: No comment provided

author: maurice clottey
text: No comment provided

author: Mario Martinez
text: Delicious food and excellent customer service.

author: Jose Escobar
text: Good attitude excellent service

author: Manuel Bou
text:
First time trying this place out. Ordered some pizza and some wings.
Let's talk about the wings first.
I think the photo will best describe my concern with the amount I paid 12 dollars for an order of wings and these tiny sized wings must be really hard to find in the market. They we all 1.5 inches in length. No meat to be had. Never seen anything like it.
I will not be ordering wings here ever again.

Now it's not all bad, if you want a good pizza then this is the place but so far I think they shouldn't venture far out of the Italian menu.

author: K P
text: Those Vocelli rolls are everything!!

author: Lyliana R Krupa
text: I ordered pick up 2 , 3 times aweek….i love the food but this is the 3rd times I got the roll uncooked inside.  Today I got the same thing.

author: C M
text: The cauliflower crust pizza is great and healthy

author: Dennis Manning
text: Just had a pizza delivered from them and man it’s probably one of the best I’ve had in awhile. The parmesan cheese on top is the icing on the cake!

author: William Casey
text: No comment provided

author: J.M. Smoot
text: This was once my go to when I decided to eat out, but now it has just become a pain.  For 2 weeks now they have not had plant based sausage when they are the only place in town that carries it.  It is obvious by the fact that it is out that it is popular so what the heck???  Update the website or something but stop letting customers order their food only to call them back and say you’re out..yet again!!!  Providing substitutes - there is no other plant based Meat option.  Totally frustrating!!!

author: Tiffany
text: Gluten free pizza is pretty good. Few different times I've ordered it came out different but overall the wings, reg pizza, and pizza rolls are good. Pizza rolls are the best tho! The customer service is very good. I am impressed bc every order has been correct. Compared to other nearby places the orders are off almost every time. I met the owner through school and she's very nice as well.

author: Derek Kaden
text: We ordered on the Slice app, and the delivery driver left our order at the wrong address (understandable, since we live in an apartment complex where everything looks the same). After the pizza sat outside for over an hour, we eventually found it at our neighbor's. We called the restaurant, and they were very friendly. They sent new pizzas, and the delivery driver apologized. Outstanding customer service. The pizza was delicious!

author: Carl Karma
text: Great 11/10 overall great staff and pizza and deliver date - ps one guy gave me sauces to try out today and I felt blessed thanks to him

author: MARGARET ALDERIDGE
text: Pizza arrived hot and was delicious.

author: Ismail Sadaat
text: My delivery guy named momtaz had a nice ethic and manner with me while delivering the order. Even though he couldn’t speak English very well but he still did the best he could. He really deserves a nice reward for serving the best. 🥰

author: angie boggan
text: Antonio provided exceptional service today and I would visit this location again!

author: Stefanie Flores
text: Delicious food , lunch specials are worth it .

author: Emily G
text: Everyone is always nice and orders take no time being ready

author: Glazed_Waffle
text: Great eats and excellent service!

author: Reggie Why
text: I was having trouble with my iPhone, and the code, and the person behind the counter was able to help me out graciously, so great job!

author: Sedika Franklin
text: Ordering online was simple and included all the modifications I needed.  I opted for curbside because it was drizzling.  Called told the my name, car details and the brought my order right out.  My order was correctly prepared and my pepperoni rolls were piping hot just the way I like them.  My salad was prepared with all the modifications and was delicious 😋

author: lauren kroll
text: No comment provided

author: tracey Via
text: Ordered the steak and cheese it definitely not with it. The steak had hard gristle in it with barely any meet on the bread. You could see more bread than toppings and meet. I had 2 tomatoes very little onion and very little lettuce.  Very disappointed

author: Deborah Angilletta
text: No comment provided

author: Kasey “Cara” Long
text: Its incredibly hard to find good pizza in North Stafford. The big chains here have forgotten what pizza is supposed to taste like. Vocelli's is a breath of fresh air. Delicious pepperoni, edible crust, a good sauce to cheese ratio, and fantastic service. We've found a new pizza place, at last!

author: Sahar Popal
text: Tried Vocelli Pizza for the first time after seeing long lines at the grand opening. Let me tell you its the best pizza i have had for a long time. there garlic spinaci pizza is sooo delicious, I am hooked. This is going to be my goto pizza for now.

author: James Matarrese
text: Unremarkable pizza. It's almost flavorless. Odd thing, its not bad or gross, just bland nothingness. I judge pizza with the "plain cheese trial". If their cheese pizza is bad, toppings aren't gonna save them. Pretty skimpy on everything unless you order double toppings. Not enough sauce or cheese compared to dough. Big ring of crust to actual pizza. Better than little caesars, but only by a hair, and its like triple the price. Delivery time was fine, staff was fine. Pepperoni was good, but you have to order double pep is you want to taste it, sausage was ok too.

author: gaby manzanares
text: Definitely my favorite pizza place to go! Highly recommend!!!!!

author: dope
text: First time trying Vocelli’s Pizza since it was new in the area and let me just say so far the best pizza in the area no other pizza places can compete with it. I recommend there Buffalo Chicken pizza and Cheese Sticks.

author: Christina Franklin (princessc93)
text: It seemed like everyone in Stafford was ordering pizza from this location when I arrived. It was super crowded since this is a new Vocelli’s and the only one in the area. The wait was long, but I could tell the staff was working very hard to ensure that everyone received their orders timely despite it being packed. The pizza was hot and fresh when I picked it up. I did have to wait a little longer but the manager personally came and apologized to me for the long wait and also offered me a free dessert. Great customer service! The pizza tasted great and was definitely worth the wait. If you are in Stafford please consider visiting this location!

author: Jessie nash
text: Ordered from this location twice, both times the food was good and was finished in a timely manner. Surprised at the bad reviews, but maybe since they are a new location they are still working out kinks.

author: Janey George
text: We ordered meatball marinara, chicken Alfredo, pizza with pepperoni, Stromboli with ham, pepperoni and salomi and garlic bread bites.  The meatball marinara was very dry and not very good, the chicken Alfredo would've been better had there been chicken in it.  The Stromboli would've been good had they put the salomi in it and if half of it wouldn't of been nothing but the bread.  The garlic bread that went with the meal tasted like they poured garlic salt on top of butter.

author: Miranda Rinck
text: Online order, steak stromboli and a spicy italian stromboli for delivery on a Sunday at lunchtime. Order was out for delivery 15 min after the order was placed, arrived hot and tasted amazing. Ordered out of the specials section, prices very reasonable. Will absolutely be ordering more often.

author: C Z
text: You're pizza wont be ready till your kids graduate with a doctorate degree.

author: Matt Howard
text:
An hour and a half wait after ordering and no updates. Nobody answering the phone at the store and the 800 number hung up on us. Had to drive to the store to cancel the order. They hadn't even started it.

Lot of nerve charging that much for pizza and making people wait that long. I had high hopes for a new pizza place in Stafford but they're clearly unprepared to run a pizza restaurant.

author: Wanda Blackwell
text: Not all Vocelli's are the same. I've been spoiled by the one outside the Fort Belvoir gate. They know the real meaning of a hot sub. I could have dealt with the lukewarm sub and visited again, but I don't think that will happen.  First I had to ask the cashier to pull his mask over his nose while I was ordering.  I left out and came back to pick up my food, when I noticed the guy making pizza rolls, I believe, was not wearing any gloves and he finished one thing and went to another.  As if that wasn't bad enough, he used his bare hands to scrape the extra cheese and flour that had fallen onto the table into a sifter. He then shook the sifter over the container holding flour and poured the cheese from the sifter into the cheese container to use on the next order. Soooo disappointed!! Thanks, but no thanks!

author: heather valenti
text: It's like dominos pizza- but way more expensive, and not as good.

author: Hannah Goldberg
text: Tasted like freezer pizza and bowling alley pizza had a baby. Super gummy and gross would not eat again.

author: Brokxn_vxbe
text: Went here when they were giving out free cheese pizza its th best I've tried in the area

author: Brooke Sharp
text:
Garlic knots were fantastic.

I really love NY style ( thin/ crispy crust ) so I wasn't a fan of the pizza's thicker crust. The large did not seem as large as a normal large and seemed a little pricey to me. However the staff was friendly and timely. I would like to try some more of their other food just based off of how good the garlic knots were.

author: Terry Anderson
text: Great pizza

author: Ahmednur Dahir

author: hailey alyssa
text: Amazing service. This was the best tasting pizza I’ve ever had. I’ve had pizza and breadsticks for take out and delivery. Their drivers are highly professional and use proper and thorough communication. Always friendly and attentive. Whenever we go to the restaurant, we are always greeted with a smile and from the looks of it, their staff is very hardworking. They all deserve a raise!

author: dominic terreri
text:
Fred is the best!
The pizza is by far the best we have ever had...
This from an Italian family!
Great service and excellent quality 👌

author: Bruny Agramonte
text: Good food, but don't order delivery. They always seem to forget one or two items.

author: parkerfamily94
text: No comment provided

author: Lele
text: Good pizza!

author: Sarah Bride
text: We love this place. My husband and kids never get pizza anywhere else. So delicious. Wish they had big salads, but that’s not what they are famous for. Overall superb and recommend.

author: Josiah Duggan
text: No comment provided

author: Jake Tychan
text: My order is always correct, tastes great, and delivered relatively quickly depending on business time of day. Great service.

author: Desire G
text:
This was my first time here, since it was right next to the nail salon i decided to get some food before going home. Some reviews saying “the best in stafford,” umm yeah that review had to be paid for because it is no way anyone’s taste buds can think this was supreme quality pizza. The way the salad was described to me by the cashier which made me get it… “premium grilled chicken” etc you would think you were getting fresh grilled chicken, clearly it is freezer processed chicken thrown on there. The pizza looks like chuck e cheese pizza and even that pizza has a slight bit more flavor to it, this one from Vocelli tastes like frozen pizza, FLAVORLESS weird texture and random pizza cheese thrown on. When you have fresh pizza made the cheese shouldn’t be stiff and get cold so soon after it is taken out of the oven, I literally live down the street and my pizza was cold when I got home. You can tell it is no care in the ingredients chosen. Their bags and boxes states “Italian quality” which is FAR from Italian Quality pizza.

The staff was friendly and their facility was clean (which is the reason I gave 2 stars instead), other than that I wont be back nor will I recommend this place. Nothing spectacular about it, I should have known as soon as I seen the oven they were using amongst other things, extremely subpar pizza.

author: kathryn Leary
text:
Best pizza in Stafford, VA
Also, garlic rolls, pepperoni rolls, and of course the cannoli. 😋

author: Paul Walker
text: loved it and the staff members are always happy to help

author: M 1
text: The store was closed to closing but yet the cashier and cook greeted us with a smile. They took the time to explain the menu and offer specials from the location. Our pizzas came out satisfactorily hot and cheesy. The cashier Freddie was extremely patient and nice. The young lady who was making the pizzas took the time to ensure we were satisfied with our order. The store was clean and tidy. The service was great and the food was spot on. Vocelli's pizza has definitely left a tasty impression. It is the pizza place to visit when in Stafford.

author: Cesar Flores
text: No comment provided

author: Mahd Iqbal
text: The delivery driver had the nerve to ask for a tip repeatedly even after being 50 minutes late and rude and the food wasn't that great either

author: Juan Dieguez
text:
Ordered wings n small pizza. Delivery guy drops off hot. Then I open the box.
Is a CPA cooking the food? Because if he is, get out of the kitchen and let the cook do their job!!!

How do you enjoy wings with 2 tablespoons of watered down dip, opened and not even full to the top!!! Vocelli is a greedy hog. For $50 you could have spared another 5 cents of dip!!! When I called, "oh that's all we're allowed to give. What a joke.

Don't buy here. Overrated, overpriced and a disservice to your hunger. Even the delivery guy said he would return to get more.

author: Dolores Allen
text: No comment provided

author: Mike
text: Very good Pizza! Possibly the best in the area!!

author: Azzy Riah
text: No comment provided

author: Jessica O
text: Best pizza in Stafford! I know this is my own personal opinion, but pizza is yummy and I’ve tried all the area restaurants. Their Deluxe Pizza is definitely worth a try! Their wings are appetizers are good as well. You’ll pay a bit more for their pizza, but it comes through in the flavor and quality. They deliver!

author: Eric C
text:
AMAZING!! I got the lunch special, steak Stromboli. 10/10

Service was also 10/10

Will definitely be back, loved my order!

author: Kayla Reeder
text: No comment provided

author: Kayla Reeder

author: Karla
text: Amazing service . Good pizza.

author: Maahir Ather
text: The best pizza i ever had in my life since i moved to stafford

author: Keme Aegis
text:
Recent update: chunked it from 5 starts> 2 stars> and now 1 star.
The owner commented under my review to contact him to fox the issue, but so far it's just been words for Google reputation. So sadly, I have to remove all stars to 1 star. The pizzas are great, I recommend. But I don't think I will be visiting there unless the owner responds. If they don't, it will stay at 1 star.

Update: got a coupon code over email. I ordered two small pizzas over phone, making sure to clarify the price AND the order. I repeated over phone and they said yes to everything. We come to pickup and they say the full price because the coupon doesnt apply to the pizzas we picked. I asked why they couldnt have told that over the phone. I doubt the coupon even worked to start with. Went away very disappointed. Felt like a scam. There was NO way the person on the call(who was the cashier) would have misunderstood.
According to my previous review, I love giving them business, but this slimey gesture put me off significantly.

Old review: The pizzas they make are AMAZING! A large is enough for 2-3 people. Havent tasted pizza this unique in flavor.

author: Adriana Coña
text: No comment provided

author: Peggy Harris
text: First time ordering, we got three pizza’s and bacon cheddar rolls last night that we picked up around 7pm ish. The pizza was horrible so dry it was like eating cardboard plus it was completely cold. The anniversary special is missing leading as well, its only for one pizza.  Called back this morning and the office manager stated that they could do nothing about the horrible pizza since we were calling the next day and that we had plenty of time to call yesterday. Which was completely rude and not an excuse for horrible food. If i could give this place a 0 star I would.

author: Elissa Kartune
text: I love their pizza! It’s one of the family favorites. Everyone is friendly

author: B Nicole
text: Chicken Alfredo sauce was very watery and not much pasta or chicken in the dish. Pizza barely has cheese on it and only two pepperonis per slice.

author: Katherine Dry
text: No comment provided

author: Amit Pagedar
text: Really good pizza. One of the best Italian pizzas I’ve had.

author: Amanda Smith
text: Love this place! Customer service has been great.  Delivery drivers very nice. No complaints. Great specials! Cauliflower pizza, pizza rolls, breadstick bites, thin crust pizza all are 5 stars for my family and I.

author: T. S
text: Normally my favorite place to get pizza, however tonight was disappointing.

author: Henry
text: What a great looking lobby for Christmas

author: Vicki Brown
text: The food was amazing! Best pizza in the area. Alfredo was very nice and answered all our questions about what they offered. We will definitely be visiting again in the future.

author: Tavane Reid
text: Amazing pizza! best i’ve ever had in my life 10/10. Very respectful and hard working employees! I would definitely recommend this place. 😀

author: Vipul N Shah.
text: Pizza was excellent, service was horrible. That is why I am not going back. Plenty of other choices to eat at.

author: F'burg Foodie
text:
UPDATED January 2026:
We recently ordered from Vocelli Pizza via UberEats.  The Uber Eats site is poorly set up for this pizza place, as there’s no way to modify specialty pizzas (I want extra sauce) or create your own pizza and make half toppings on the pizza – this can be changed by the restaurant, they just need to do it.  We ordered their Quatro Cheese and an order of their pepperoni rolls.

The food was delivered quickly and was still a decent, warm temperature when it arrived, which is how we prefer pizza.  We want it as hot and fresh as possible.  This pizza tasted GREAT!  Very very good!  Regarding the extra sauce I wanted, I called the restaurant after placing my UberEats order and asked them if they would add extra sauce to our order and the young man on the phone said he would… and he did!  It was perfectly made, with a nice amount of their tasty sauce on it.  The pepperoni rolls are legitimately some of the best I’ve had.  I’ve been to many places in Pittsburgh, where they sell them everywhere and where Vocellis was founded and the pepperoni rolls I get from my two local Vocellis are just as good as any I’ve had up there.

Definitely will order from this location again!

______________________________________________________________
It had been a couple of years since I’ve had Vocelli’s so we used Uber Eats to give them a try recently.  They had a promotion of free peperoni rolls with a large pizza, so we got a large peperoni pizza and those pepperoni rolls.

The pizza was great!  Very tasty, especially the next day after reheating it.  The crust was spot on, flavorful, and tender!  The little peperoni they use cups up nicely too and the cheese was great.  I just wish it had a little more tomato sauce on it.  I opted for a side of the garlic sauce to go with it as a dip and that sauce was awesome!  Great for dipping the crust into!!

The pepperoni rolls were so good and very soft, tender, and not dry or hard.  Dipping them into a side of their tomato sauce really finished them off perfectly!

Hope I don’t wait another year or more to try their pizza again… This was pretty good!

author: John Stephansky
text: No comment provided

author: Steve Schwartz
text: Best pizza I’ve had in Stafford.  First time I tried it, Christmas evening.  Crust was exceptional and everything full of flavor.  Only complaint is the same for most pizza joints (not all).  They need more non-pork meat options.  Turkey pepperoni is common and cheap.  More beef options, all beef meatballs.  Accommodate customers! Otherwise exceptional pizza!

Ridiculous service. DO NOT ORDER FROM THEM. You’ve been warned.

I had to microwave the bland pizza (they messed up my order, by the way) and it still tasted like a sad imitation of pizza. Kinda sad that zero stars isn't an option.

author: James Truax
text:
Tonight was the 2nd time we had pizza from Vicelli’s. The first time we had it was just ok so we thought we would give them a 2nd chance since everyone can have an off night.  Sorry that we did.  The pizza was horrible. No other way to say it.  My six year old set it down on his plate and said “this pizza is gross”.
The traditional crust pizza we order was more like a thin crust.  It had no flavor, no sauce and very little cheese.  The crust was thin but some how chewy.  I can tell you we will never know if the 3rd time would be the charm.

author: Aaron Harvey
text: I've ordered delivery from them for quite a while.  The last two deliveries I've received seemed like they really mailed it in on all the stuff that isn't pizza.  The lettuce was half wilted on the salad, and the wings that had been so good in the past just had the sauce drizzled on in a clearly visible "squiggly" line.  The pizza was still great, but their sides left a lot to be desired.

author: Melody Nelson
text: I use to love this place. Something change (I don't know maybe the managment changed) either way. The customer service is horrible, the wings are soggy and disgusting. The pasta is burnt on the bottom. My last time ordering the delivery driver showed up with no change. Just stood there looking stupid. I called resturant ask for the manager and she request I pay by card or they would have to take the food back. Everytime the black girl delivers my food its cold and she's unprepared. I've recently STOP ordering and became a Papa John's fan now. Chipotle's wings are awesome at papa johns!!!!

author: Ms. B (Ms. B)
text: Pizza is good. Not very happy with staff.  Called and placed togo order and when I arrived to pick up lady charged me more than what I was quoted over the phone.  She didn't apologize and with a little snappy attitude told me the girl who took my order did it wrong.

author: William Diaz
text: No comment provided

author: Hannah Roberts !
text: Came here to pick up an order. Only 2 young girls working in the back. Kept arguing and complaining about having to make food. And asking each other to make the food because they didn't want to. Completely lazy and unprofessional.

author: Vanessa M
text: First time customer. Ordered pick up, was quoted to be ready in 15 min, got there and pizza was ready. Pizza was smaller than expected, will order a large next time. Cannoli was softer than others we have had in the past. Thought it was a little pricey for what we got.

author: D Miller
text: Yummy yum yum

author: Heela Barakzai
text: Order was wrong. Staff unprofessional. Waist of time and money.

author: Charlie McElvy
text: We love Vocelli’s pizza! While we have a local favorite pie joint (Benny Vitali’s), Vocelli’s is the only large box pizza joint my fam will request! My teens LOVE their Buffalo Chicken pies, and I’m a huge fan of their “carnivore” (my name for it) all meats pie!

author: Kassandra Gladieux
text: Amazing food and great, fast service!

author: Freddie Jacobs
text: Hands down the worst pizza and service I have ever had not only did they bring me the wrong order the pizza that was made was nothing but Sauce when I called back they knew it was wrong never called to tell me  when  tried to speak to manager at first was told he was busy had to demand to speak to him talked to Armell  who is manager after going back and forth agreed to refund money on card and come get the wrong bad pizzas as of this post still no refund The only positive was a great respectfulll delivery driver he needs a raise to have to deal with the incompetent management

author: Kylee Kindred
text: We are new to the area and thought we would give Vocelli Pizza a try. I placed an order online for 4 pizzas.  I then received a phone call that they were out of medium dough.  I was told I needed to cancel my order online and place a new one. I then asked if they could do a small pizza and large pizza instead of 2 mediums. I was told they could not and I needed to cancel my order.  So, I went online and checked my email looking for a way to cancel.  No way to do so. Called the restaurant back to let them know and was told they would cancel my order at the restaurant and to call back if I don't get a refund.  Wow. Just wow. Customer Service 101: If you are out of an option, offer a substitute. And if you can't,  don't send your customer on a wild goose chase.

author: Łøvèłÿ śtìtćh
text: Worst service ever I call them two times after placing my order, after answering, hanged up two times on me.

author: Stacie Peyton
text: I can not get enough! I have been visiting this restaurant during the week for a couple of weeks now as of this post, and I have yet to be displeased with my food. I don’t give 5 stars anywhere because nothing in life is perfect - for that reason, consider 4 stars close enough! Nummy 😋🍕

text: My favorite pizza restuarant! They have the best pizza ever!

author: maria torres
text:
Vocelli
Got to try this amazing place. You see , ever since coming back to the land of the free, you start remembering things like, how there are other food places that delivers and you know there are food beyond fast food. I happen to choose my favorite kind of delivery, the pizza. 15 minute walk from my place is this very old school pizza looking restaurant that just made me go Gaga. Their menu alone made me drool that I had to have this for dinner. On their pizza, besides the usual sausage and pepperoni, is what looks like candied bacon and some roasted ham. The crust has that crunch, that anyone can ask for and the taste are like friends , having a good time in your mouth. The rolls that has the veggies , are with mushrooms, spinach and fresh mozzarella that was to die for. In every bite you take, you will taste everything, plus the garlicky olive oil that they add on top . Very delicious over all and amazing staff. This is for sure my go to pizza place from now on.

author: Patricia Snow
text: I love vocellis pizza

author: Ricky Rawlings
text: This place was absolutely amazing, the worker was also so nice. The voceli rolls are an absolute must.

author: David Howard
text: Never received anything.  Was in a hotel, placed an order for a pizza.  With delivery 1 large specialty pizza came to close to 40 bucks, which was ridiculous, but it's travel and kids were tired so just went with it.  Hour and half still in "preparation" status.  Have called, have texted through the site.  No response.  Just sent to Voicemail.  Will have to dispute the charge tomorrow, will go get some snacks from the lobby for dinner i guess.

author: Joseph Newago
text: They made us pick up cold pizza and made us pay for delivery fee and tip for driver when we picked it up or refund the tip or delivery fee

author: Nick Hennessey
text: We got a Hawaiian pizza, using the picture as somewhat of an estimate of what we'd get. We got probably a quarter of the pictured toppings, and we got a larger pizza, too. Very disappointed. I'd rather get three Costco pizzas for the same price this single pizza was. Hell, I'd rather get Little Caesars.

author: gary tilson
text: Food was cold, wifes sandwich was all wrong. Was out for delivery and took 45 minutes from then to arrive.

author: Sylvain Beland
text:
I'm traveling and ordered from a hotel room.
I ordered 1 small pizza with all the fixin's I wanted and a salad with feta cheese and Greek dressing.
The pizza was spot on and tasted great.
The salad was composed of oignons, olives, peppers, tomatoes, feta cheese and 4 fist size iceberg lettuce pieces, that I could have cut myself if they had supplied me with a knife and fork to eat the thing. I also got Balsamic dressing instead of what I requested.
The salad had fresh ingredient I must say it would have been great if cut into manageable bite size pieces.
I requested the restaurant delivery person (not doordash or others) for my order and he was very polite and nice. I prefer to use the restaurant's delivery person option when it's available. More money goes back to them.
I will most likely give them another salad try at a later date and see...

My husband had chicken wings and he said they were great ! Only issue it took forever just to place the order , the person didn’t understand me and then had to get someone else to take the order , credit machine wasn’t working I had to wait 10 minutes or so … I guess that was just more of my own annoyance, the food was still good !

I frequently order from here as they're local to where I live and delivery is super fast! The cauliflower crust pizza is AMAZING. I love it! I've only ever had a not-so-great experience once as the pizza arrived shaken up and toppings spilled over. Other than that they've been great, delivery is fast and pizza is good!

EDIT- order i just received was again, sloppy and toppings were all over the place. Delivery driver was completely out of breath and holding an inhaler, probably dropped it? Lovely. Down to 3 stars.

author: Maahir Ather
text:
I recently tried Vocelli Pizza at 754 Warrenton Road and I must say I was thoroughly impressed. The pizza was delicious and exceeded my expectations. The crust was perfectly crispy and the toppings were fresh and flavorful. The staff was friendly and accommodating, and my order was ready in a timely manner.

What I loved most about this location was the cleanliness of the restaurant. The dining area was spotless, and the kitchen looked well-maintained. It was clear that the staff takes great pride in their work and the quality of their food.

Overall, I highly recommend Vocelli Pizza at 754 Warrenton Road to anyone looking for a tasty, high-quality pizza in a clean and welcoming environment. I will definitely be returning for more of their delicious pizza.

author: Walt B
text:
Just frustrating!
I ordered 2 pizzas for pickup at 4:30p for pickup at 6p.
I showed up at 6:06p the order hadn't been prepared. I had a sitter at home and another child waiting for pickup at Gayle MS. I didn't leave with pizza until 6:36p, I was 30 minutes delayed picking up my child, and had to text the sitter to stay longer. I had pre-paid the order, but probably should've asked for a refund and ordered off the Domino's Pizza app for delivery -that would've worked much better. This experience was super annoying. I was given a bag of 5 cookies as an apology. Pizza was prepared properly but un-remarkable. Lesson learned!

This was absolutely disgusting and they need better ways to make sure this doesn't happen again. This ruined our dinner.

author: Vijay Bhaskar
text:
Vocelli is a fantastic restaurant that offers a delectable selection of pizza and subs, accompanied by outstanding service from their attentive staff. During my recent visit, I had the pleasure of indulging in their menu and experiencing their top-notch customer service.

Let's start with the food. The pizzas at Vocelli are absolutely mouthwatering. The crust is perfectly baked, with a delightful balance of crispiness and chewiness. The sauce is rich and flavorful, complemented by a generous amount of gooey, melted cheese. I particularly enjoyed the wide variety of toppings available, ensuring that there's something to suit everyone's taste buds. Whether you prefer classic combinations like pepperoni and mushrooms or more adventurous options like barbecue chicken, Vocelli has it all. The quality of the ingredients shines through, making each bite a delightful explosion of flavors. The subs are equally impressive, with a wide array of fillings, fresh bread, and the perfect blend of textures.

However, what truly sets Vocelli apart is their exceptional staff service. From the moment I walked in, I was greeted with warm smiles and a genuine willingness to make my dining experience enjoyable. The staff members were knowledgeable about the menu and took the time to patiently answer my questions. They were attentive without being intrusive, ensuring that my needs were met without delay. Despite the restaurant being busy, the staff remained composed and professional, making sure every customer received the attention they deserved. This level of customer care made me feel valued as a guest and left a lasting positive impression.

In terms of the ambiance, Vocelli creates a cozy and inviting atmosphere. The restaurant is clean, well-maintained, and exudes a friendly vibe. Whether you're dining in or ordering for takeout, the staff goes above and beyond to ensure a seamless experience.

author: Vanessa Hough
text: No comment provided

author: Carter Miller
text: I ordered a medium pepperoni mushroom for delivery. The driver was here in less than 25 minutes and the pizza bag was literally steaming. Hot, Fast, Delicious

author: Gina Zhao
text: The pizza here is seriously good! hot, fresh, and loaded with flavor. The crust is just right and the toppings are generous. Everything tastes like it’s made with care. If you’re looking for solid, reliable pizza, this is the place!

author: Timmy Rohlfs
text: The best of the best!  Joe and Sharon make the best pizzas and have the best staff!  Highly reccomend the Vocelli Rolls and breadsticks!

author: Allison Boltz
text:
This pizza shop is finally reopened and under new ownership and you can really tell they care about quality and customer service. The staff was super friendly and welcoming, and the pizza was amazing.

The crust was perfectly baked with a crisp edge, the cheese was melted just right, and the pepperoni was the best part — those little cupped pepperonis that get slightly crispy and hold all the flavor. Everything was fresh, hot, and delicious.

Highly recommend!

Complete BS, according to corporate it has not been discontinued. Be wary of this store they are using products that are not approved by corporate. Who knows what else they are doing behind the counter.

text: I keep seeing this place advertising deals. I’d like you to know I still haven’t forgotten a while back I got an email saying HAPPY BIRTHDAY FREE MEDIUM PIZZA ON US! I even complained to corporate about THIS very incident and left EVERY contact information. Guess what happened? Nothing. Got 0 response
